recommendations.title: Never Let Me Go
recommendations.overview: As children, Kathy, Ruth, and Tommy spend their childhood at an idyllic and secluded English boarding school. As they grow into adults, they must come to terms with the complexity and strength of their love for one another while also preparing for th

recommendations.title: HIStory on Film, Volume II
recommendations.overview: Nearly 2 hours of the short films that made HIStory... Including never before released short films.
recommendations.director: Spike Lee, James Yukich, Mark Romanek, Colin Chilvers, Vincent Paterson, Don Mischer, Wayne Isham, Nicholas Brandt, John Landis, Bob Giraldi

recommendations.title: Lemonade
recommendations.overview: The second "visual album" (a collection of short films) by Beyoncé, this time around she takes a piercing look at racial issues and feminist concepts through a sexualized, satirical, and solemn tone.
recommendations.director: Kahlil Joseph, Melina Matsoukas, Dikayl Rimmasch, Mark Romanek, Beyoncé, Todd Tourso, Jonas Åkerlund

recommendations.title: The Truman Show
recommendations.overview: In a picture-perfect seaside town, an insurance salesman begins to realize that his entire existence may be staged and observed by a vast unseen audience as part of a reality TV show.

recommendations.title: Little Nemo: Adventures in Slumberland
recommendations.overview: A little boy whose dreams transcend reality is sucked into his own fantasy, which is everything he has dreamed of, until he unleashes an old secret that may not only destroy this perfect dream world but reality itself.
recommendations.director: William T. Hurtz, Masanori Hata, Masami Hata

recommendations.title: Paddington in Peru
recommendations.overview: Paddington travels to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy, who now resides at the Home for Retired Bears. With the Brown Family in tow, a thrilling adventure ensues when a mystery plunges them into an unexpected journey through the Amazon rainforest

recommendations.title: Sword Art Online the Movie: Ordinal Scale
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: In 2026, a new machine called the Augma is developed to compete against the NerveGear and its successor, the Amusphere. A next-gen wearable device, the Augma doesn't have a full-dive function like its predecessors. Instead, it uses Augmented Reality

recommendations.title: Lorenzo
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Horror
recommendations.overview: A cat named Lorenzo is dismayed to discover that his tail has developed a personality of its own.

recommendations.title: Survive Style 5+
recommendations.overview: Five bizarre stories with no apparent connection to one another eventually become intertwined, resulting in surreal circumstances.

recommendations.title: Migration
recommendations.overview: After a migrating duck family alights on their pond with thrilling tales of far-flung places, the Mallard family embarks on a family road trip, from New England, to New York City, to tropical Jamaica.
